title: helichrysum indutum
intro: Helichrysum indutum, also known as the yellow alkanet or common alkanet, is a flowering plant species within the borage family (Boraginaceae) that is native to the Mediterranean region. The medicinal properties of Helichrysum indutum include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which are attributed to its high concentration of anthocyanins and other polyphenolic compounds. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and protect against oxidative stress and cell damage. Helichrysum indutum can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
